component.name: Advancely
component.summary: A highly customizable and interactive tool to track Minecraft progress beyond just Advancements.

description.p: Advancely is a sophisticated, data-driven progress tracker designed for Minecraft speedrunners, completionists, and content creators. Unlike other tools that only track vanilla advancements, Advancely can be configured to monitor virtually any goal you can imagine. It operates in real-time by watching your singleplayer save files for changes, meaning your progress is always up-to-date without any manual intervention. Its true power lies in its .json template system, which allows you to define exactly what you want to track for any version, mod, or playstyle.

ul.li: Exported template zips now embed their exact version, category, and flag, so the import fields pre-fill correctly instead of being guessed from the filename.
The default template is now all_advancements _aatool_optimized; corrupted/missing-template recovery falls back to it.
Coop: complex advancements/achievements can be assigned to specific players; "auto" still tracks the player with the most criteria.
Goal hiding mode moved to a dropdown in the tracker controls and applies instantly without restarting the overlay.
More bulk actions for Recipe, Row 3, Row 2, and Per-Stage Icons checkboxes.
New templates: 1.6.4 all_achievements _ssg_kaimaseed, plus 26.1 and 26.2 categorical templates.
Fixes: main game files now take priority over the 5-minute Hermes re-read so advancements revoke properly; "Row 3" checkbox persists across template switches; note window no longer reverts on ESC.

Ghost players: contributors who appear in the world's advancements/stats/unlocks folder but aren't connected to the lobby still count toward combined progress, and can be selected from the player dropdown.
Auto-completion / linked goals now extend to multi-stage goal stages, with shells and trims wired up across all templates. Removing a goal that's linked from a stat also clears the link cleanly.
Inverted goal hiding mode: goals can fade in or brighten as they're completed instead of disappearing.
Custom completion threshold for the run (handy for Half% and similar categories).
Bulk-layout positions are now individually adjustable, and Progress Pos. is available in bulk selection once any complex advancement/achievement is picked.
"Use Game Capture" hint next to the Enable Overlay checkbox is now highlighted in orange for visibility.
"Syncing for <Player>" now also shows for offline/ghost players and works on the host side, not just the receiver.

Fixes: Hermes log file is redetected properly on new world creation; nested import popups' Select/Deselect All now respect the active search filter; renamed 1.14 and 1.15 all_advancements templates to their _optimized variants.

Cross-template imports on every main tab and on nested per-parent imports (criteria, sub-stats, stages). A Language dropdown picks the source lang file for display names, and any linked-goal refs that won't resolve after the import are flagged before you confirm.

Template update helpers in the advancement/achievement player-file import popup: preview new entries, detect renames by basename and ≥80% criteria overlap, prune stale entries, and apply criteria differences row by row. Every helper popup has its own search bar.
Advancement criteria grouping: multiple criteria can share a single progress slot, so packs like BlazeandCaves' "Ultimate Enchanter" track correctly.
Bulk actions consolidated under one button across all 10 editor lists: bulk delete, reorder, icon-path change, and manual layout positioning with automatic grid placement.
Every template now carries a built-in display_category; all official templates updated.

Fixes: corrected 1.12 - 1.12.2 root-name format checks on import, unsaved-changes popup no longer flickers behind the import popup, relay requires matching latest version (direct LAN only needs matching versions), coop face now respects text anchor, new-template-then-revert no longer leaves the editor in a stuck state.
Coop relay: large frames no longer disconnect receivers. Frames are now zlib-compressed, the size cap is gone, and slow consumers no longer block the rest of the room.
Player faces now show next to advancement criteria, indicating the player furthest along on that complex advancement.
Joining or rejoining a coop lobby no longer restarts the overlay window.
Cumulative is now the default stat merge mode for coop (was Highest).
Coop disconnect logs now include frame type, payload size, how far the read got, and timing info to distinguish stalls from instant closes.
Added Player Faces for Coop.
Some networking fixes and more detailed error codes.
Added 'Uh Oh' advancement to 26.2 template.
Added new MSYHBD.TTC font along with .ttc support. Hotkeys use key-capture input.
'Edit Templates' renamed to 'Open Template Editor'.
Overlay width saves properly again.
Supporters shown in welcome message.
Fixed folders opening up twice.
Fixed Linux certification path issue for installers.
Sub-stat progress text is now its own positionable element.
Fixed co-op sync issues where stat checkboxes and custom goal toggles wouldn't update properly between the host's view and the receiver's view, especially on individual player views.
Fixed the "All Players" view sometimes showing the wrong progress after toggling things, and not updating until the dropdown was clicked again.
Added a small warning under the Room Code field when the entered code doesn't match the expected format (6 letters/numbers).
Closing Advancely via the X on the Overlay window now properly asks for confirmation if a lobby is active or there are unsaved changes, and the overlay comes back if you cancel.
The merged player view now actually tracks the player with the most criteria for each advancement.
Small update to the Herdcraft template and a quick Hotfix for both the AUR Linux installers and NixOS distribution.
Co-op multiplayer: full Host/Receiver model with lobbies via relay server or directly through LAN. Coop supports EVERY minecraft version including legacy.

Co-op relay server: new official Advancely relay (TLS + cert pinning, hosted in New York) is now the default transport; no port forwarding or VPN required, just a 6-character room code and optional password.
Active Lobbies browser to discover open public rooms.
New timer formatting options: unit spacing (02 m 04 s 500 ms) and always-show-milliseconds.
Supporters list shown on every settings tab, sorted by donation amount.
Updated 1.16 all_advancements_categorical template.
Various fixes: browser links no longer open twice on Windows, "Run Completed" text respects the active view, moving windows no longer triggers a full file reload.
New '--relay-test' CLI flag for a one-shot TLS + cert-pin connectivity check.
Small fix with Ctrl/Cmd + F not working on the tracker.
Added support for 26.1.1 and 26w14a.
Added 26w14a all_advancements template.
